title: avenella flexuosa subsp. mairei
intro: Avenella flexuosa subsp. mairei, also known as Maire's bent-grass or bent-grass, is a type of grass species in the genus Avenella. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its content of saponins and flavonoids. Studies have shown that Avenella flexuosa subsp. mairei has potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may aid in the prevention and treatment of various diseases. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or in the form of dried extracts, to utilize its medicinal properties.
